Platform Workflow Supabase guide Download

Construction control for field teams

Run every construction project from one operational cockpit.

ConstructManager brings budgets, deadlines, responsibilities, photos, maps and Supabase-backed access into one mobile-first workspace for contractors, customers and executors.

What the app covers

A complete field-to-office loop.

Every module maps to a real workflow already present in the Flutter app.

01

Project portfolio

Create construction objects, store addresses, types, responsible people and stage statuses from preparation to completion.

02

Budget control

Track budget items, descriptions and values while database triggers keep project totals consistent.

03

Schedule and delays

Manage deadlines, solved states and delay claims with flags for excusable, compensable, concurrent and critical cases.

04

Responsibility matrix

Assign tasks to responsible emails, track open or solved status and keep accountability visible.

05

Photo evidence

Upload site photos to Supabase Storage, add descriptions and review visual progress from a compact gallery.

06

Map context

Save map addresses and view project location context with OpenStreetMap-based map screens.

Designed for adoption

A workflow your site team can actually keep updated.

1

Connect Supabase

Paste Project URL and anon key in app settings. Authentication and storage are ready for the team.

2

Create the project

Add title, address, type, stage, owner and responsible people. Then open the object workspace.

3

Run daily control

Update budget, schedule, responsibility, delays, photos and map notes from the same project view.

ConstructManager
